## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss tech SEO improvements for The Adventures Group, focusing on schema implementation and blog template updates.](https://fathom.video/share/8nsxkP6RrJSGBA417M_c8y6ynNVPvhbq?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Carlos to create doc for adding schema dropdown in Sanity CMS blog section (due today)](https://fathom.video/share/8nsxkP6RrJSGBA417M_c8y6ynNVPvhbq?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Team to review/approve schema implementation plan before submitting to developers](https://fathom.video/share/8nsxkP6RrJSGBA417M_c8y6ynNVPvhbq?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Blog template improvements needed: H2 tags, spacing issues, schema integration](https://fathom.video/share/8nsxkP6RrJSGBA417M_c8y6ynNVPvhbq?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [Potential keyword stuffing in older content; Carlos to provide examples and guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/8nsxkP6RrJSGBA417M_c8y6ynNVPvhbq?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions and Project Overview

  - [Mariana: Managing editor for Adventures Group (3 months)](https://fathom.video/share/8nsxkP6RrJSGBA417M_c8y6ynNVPvhbq?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [Dave: 20+ years SEO experience (Attics, Adventures, TripAdvisor)](https://fathom.video/share/8nsxkP6RrJSGBA417M_c8y6ynNVPvhbq?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [Carlos: SEO specialist, joining to assist with technical SEO](https://fathom.video/share/8nsxkP6RrJSGBA417M_c8y6ynNVPvhbq?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Current focus: Tour page optimization, editorial/blog improvements](https://fathom.video/share/8nsxkP6RrJSGBA417M_c8y6ynNVPvhbq?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)

### Schema Implementation for Blog Posts

  - [Proposal to add schemas like "tourist attraction" to blog articles](https://fathom.video/share/8nsxkP6RrJSGBA417M_c8y6ynNVPvhbq?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
  - [Dave confirms adding schema to articles is beneficial for SERP treatment](https://fathom.video/share/8nsxkP6RrJSGBA417M_c8y6ynNVPvhbq?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [Options for implementation:](https://fathom.video/share/8nsxkP6RrJSGBA417M_c8y6ynNVPvhbq?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
    1.  Custom input in article head (preferred for flexibility)
    2.  Google Tag Manager (URL-based conditioning)
  - [Team to create field in Sanity CMS for schema input during article creation](https://fathom.video/share/8nsxkP6RrJSGBA417M_c8y6ynNVPvhbq?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)

### Blog Template Improvements

  - [H2 tags now implemented, but spacing issues persist](https://fathom.video/share/8nsxkP6RrJSGBA417M_c8y6ynNVPvhbq?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [Need to align content review speed with publishing capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/8nsxkP6RrJSGBA417M_c8y6ynNVPvhbq?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [Aim to streamline optimization process for older content](https://fathom.video/share/8nsxkP6RrJSGBA417M_c8y6ynNVPvhbq?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
  - [Carlos to provide guidelines on avoiding keyword stuffing](https://fathom.video/share/8nsxkP6RrJSGBA417M_c8y6ynNVPvhbq?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Using multiple LLMs in workflow steps](https://fathom.video/share/8nsxkP6RrJSGBA417M_c8y6ynNVPvhbq?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
  - [Ability to customize prompts at article or client level](https://fathom.video/share/8nsxkP6RrJSGBA417M_c8y6ynNVPvhbq?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)
  - [Carlos offered to suggest tested prompts for improved results](https://fathom.video/share/8nsxkP6RrJSGBA417M_c8y6ynNVPvhbq?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
